summary: The project now has five bounded workflow templates, tool-backed local file, CSV, JSON, and HTTP context analysis, bounded dataset computation, structured outputs in multiple formats, audit persistence, acceptance coverage, a guided Streamlit inspection UI, and beta-facing onboarding docs. The current push is to validate external trial use while continuing to broaden bounded routing without dropping inspectability.
completed_items: Closed-loop supervisor orchestration with research, writing, and optional review stages
Bounded workflow planning that routes between research, analysis, comparison, and hybrid advisory/context requests
Structured workflow output with pretty, JSON, and Markdown renderers
Local tool integration with file preview, CSV analysis, JSON analysis, bounded dataset computation, and bounded HTTP fetch adapters
Local audit persistence, acceptance reporting, request cache, and retry plumbing
Guided Streamlit inspection for task input, plan preview, route warnings, intermediate results, recent runs, acceptance reports, cache health, per-item drill-downs, and result export
Trial-readiness roadmap section that defines beta audience, entry surfaces, exit criteria, and feedback expectations
next_items: Manually validate the beta quickstart with first-wave external testers
Collect structured trial feedback from external users
Continue broadening bounded workflow planning and guarded analysis/comparison tools
